contactFaq.helpSubtitle: Find answers to your questions or contact our support team.
contactFaq.subject: Subject
contactFaq.subjectPlaceholder: E.g. Question about a lot, shipping issue...
contactFaq.messageSent: Message sent! Our team will respond within 24h.
contactFaq.faq1a: Vary uses an escrow system: you pay upfront at the time of order, but the funds are held in a third-party account until you confirm receipt of the lot. The seller only receives their payout once you validate delivery — or automatically after 48 hours with no dispute. A Vary commission, which decreases with volume, is applied on both sides of the transaction. On your very first purchase, you benefit from a reduced welcome rate.
contactFaq.faq2q: How do I become a buyer? And a seller?
contactFaq.faq2a: Buyer: complete the profile questionnaire (categories, delivery countries, budget) and your access is instant — no waiting, no manual review. The matching algorithm immediately personalises your marketplace to surface the most relevant lots for you. Seller: access requires a manual review by the Vary team (SIRET or EU VAT number, address, business documents). This step ensures only verified businesses publish lots — which is what protects the quality of the network. Expect under 24 business hours. Once both roles are active, you switch freely between your Buyer and Seller interfaces using the tabs at the top of the page.
contactFaq.faq3a: Shipping costs are calculated automatically based on the lot's origin, your delivery country, and the number of pallets. The full cost is shown before you place any order — no surprises. Vary integrates partner carriers to simplify logistics, though some sellers may also arrange their own shipping. Once a lot is dispatched, the seller enters the tracking number from their dashboard — you are notified automatically.
contactFaq.faq4q: What happens if there is a dispute?
contactFaq.faq4a: If the lot received does not match the description, open a dispute directly from your Orders page — the button appears as soon as delivery is marked as done. You have 48 hours from delivery to act. Escrow funds remain frozen while the dispute is open: neither the seller nor anyone else can access them. The Vary team reviews the situation and rules within 5 business days. Depending on the outcome, funds are either released to the seller or refunded to you.
contactFaq.faq5q: How does Vary verify sellers and buyers?
contactFaq.faq5a: Buyers: instant activation after the questionnaire. The data you provide (categories, budget, countries, revenue) feeds the matching algorithm — the more accurate your profile, the more relevant the lots shown to you. Sellers: full manual verification by the Vary team — SIRET or EU VAT number, verifiable physical address, business documents, and profile consistency check. This dual verification is what sets Vary apart from a basic marketplace: every seller has been vetted, every buyer is qualified.
contactFaq.faq6q: As a seller, can I control who sees my lots?
contactFaq.faq6a: Yes. From your seller dashboard, you can switch your lots to filtered mode: only buyers whose profile matches your criteria (location, store type, annual revenue) will be able to see and contact you. Buyers who do not match see the lot but cannot access it without completing their profile. This feature is designed for brands and distributors who want to maintain control over their distribution network.

cgv.title: General Terms and Conditions of Sale and Use
cgv.s1Text: VARY, a SASU with share capital of €[SHARE CAPITAL], registered with the Trade and Companies Register of [RCS CITY] under number [SIRET], with its registered office at [REGISTERED ADDRESS], hereinafter 'Vary', operates a B2B marketplace dedicated to clearance of clothing and fashion accessories, accessible at vary.fr. These General Terms and Conditions ('GTC') govern all contractual relationships between Vary and any platform user, whether seller or professional buyer. The platform is exclusively reserved for professionals (B2B). Use by non-professional consumers is prohibited.
cgv.s2Text: 'Platform': the website vary.fr and associated applications. 'Seller': any professional offering batches of goods via the Platform. 'Buyer': any professional purchasing batches via the Platform. 'Batch': set of goods (clothing, accessories) offered for sale by a Seller. 'GMV': total gross merchandise value of transactions on the Platform. 'Escrow': fund sequestration mechanism entrusted to Stripe Connect. 'Dispute': formal contestation opened by a Buyer following receipt of a Batch.
cgv.s3Text: 3.1 Registration requirements: Reserved for legal entities or natural persons engaged in professional activity. Users must provide accurate, complete and up-to-date information. 3.2 Seller and Buyer accounts: Two account types — Seller (batch deposit and management) and Buyer (batch purchases). VIP subscriptions are optional (see Article 6). 3.3 Security: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials. Vary cannot be held liable for any unauthorized account use.
cgv.s4Text: 4.1 Seller obligations: Any Seller wishing to publish a Batch must mandatorily provide (a) an Excel file compliant with the official Vary template, completed with Brand, Name, Category, Gender, Size, Reference, Quantity, Retail price (€) — Photo (URL) is optional; (b) 6 mandatory photographs: (1) full pallet front view, (2) top-down view, (3) pallet label/delivery note, (4) representative open carton, (5) spread of items laid flat, (6) close-up of labels/tags. Any Excel file not compliant with the official template will be automatically rejected. 4.2 Accuracy of information: The Seller warrants the accuracy of all information provided. Any false declaration is the Seller's sole responsibility and may result in immediate account suspension. 4.3 Publication: Vary reserves the right to refuse or unpublish any Batch not complying with these GTC, without obligation to provide reasons and without compensation.
cgv.s5Text: 5.1 Standard structure: Seller commission 8% of Batch price (deducted from amount paid to Seller); Buyer commission 8% (included in price displayed); total take rate 16% of GMV. 5.2 Tiered pricing: Batch > €6,000 — Seller 7% / Buyer 6% (total 13%); 3rd purchase of the month — Buyer 6%; 3rd sale of the month — Seller 6%; New Seller (first 3 sales) — 5%; New Buyer (first purchase) — 5%. 5.3 Processing fees: Stripe Connect fees (1.5% + €0.25 + 0.25%) are deducted from Vary's gross commission. They do not impact the amount paid to the Seller or the price paid by the Buyer. 5.4 Shipping: Shipping costs are charged to the Buyer at actual cost, separately from the Batch price. They are not included in the commission calculation base.
cgv.s6Text: VIP Seller: €99 excl. VAT/month. Includes buyer statistics (favorites, budgets, profiles) and batch highlighting. VIP Buyer: €299 excl. VAT/month. Includes early access to batches (24h before general publication) and priority alerts by category. Subscriptions are without commitment, monthly renewable, cancellable at any time with effect at the end of the current period.
cgv.s7Text: 7.1 Escrow mechanism: The total order amount (Batch price + Buyer commission + shipping) is debited upon order confirmation and placed in escrow via Stripe Connect. The Seller receives no funds until the dispute period has elapsed. 7.2 Payment release: Payment is automatically released to the Seller in either case: (i) 48 hours after the delivery date confirmed by the carrier, with no dispute opened within this period; (ii) closure of a dispute in the Seller's favor. The reference date is that confirmed by carrier tracking, independently of any Buyer action. 7.3 Regulatory compliance: Escrow activity is provided via Stripe Connect, an ACPR-approved payment service provider. Vary does not intervene directly in fund custody.
cgv.s8Text: 8.1 Opening deadline: The Buyer has a strict 48-hour deadline from the carrier-confirmed delivery date to open a dispute. After this deadline, no claim is admissible and payment is definitively released to the Seller. 8.2 Admissibility: Any dispute must be accompanied by at least 3 dated photographs demonstrating the discrepancy between goods received and the published Batch description. Without sufficient evidence, the dispute is automatically rejected. 8.3 Resolution grid (within 5 business days): Discrepancy < 5% of items — dispute rejected, Seller paid in full; 5%–99% — partial refund proportional to defective item percentage; 100% — full refund of Batch price. Shipping costs remain the Buyer's responsibility in all cases. 8.4 Promotional code: In case of full refund, the Buyer automatically receives a code granting 2% reduction on their Buyer commission on their next order (valid 6 months, single use, non-combinable). 8.5 Vary's decision: Rendered after adversarial review and binding on both parties.
cgv.s9Text: 9.1 Seller suspension: Account automatically suspended after 3 validated disputes within a rolling 6-month period, or 1 dispute resulting in a full refund. Active batches are immediately unpublished; ongoing orders are honored. 9.2 Buyer suspension: Account automatically suspended after 3 abusive disputes (rejected for insufficient evidence or out of deadline) within a rolling 6-month period. 9.3 Effects of permanent exclusion: Any permanently excluded person cannot create a new account, directly or indirectly. Vary reserves the right to refuse access to any entity linked to an excluded user.
cgv.s10Text: The Platform operates in the following EU member states: Germany, Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Denmark, Spain, Estonia, Finland, France, Greece, Hungary, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Czech Republic, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Sweden. These GTC are governed by French law. Failing amicable resolution, the courts of [REGISTERED CITY] shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
cgv.s11Text: All elements constituting the Platform (brand, logo, interface, source code, content) are the exclusive property of Vary and are protected by French and European intellectual property laws. Any reproduction, in whole or in part, without prior written authorization from Vary is strictly prohibited.
cgv.s12Text: Vary processes personal data in accordance with the GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679). Users may exercise their rights of access, rectification, erasure and portability at: contact@vary.fr.
cgv.s13Text: Vary acts as a technical intermediary between Sellers and Buyers. Vary cannot be held liable for the quality of goods, transport delays or damages, or any indirect prejudice resulting from use of the Platform. Vary's liability is in any case limited to the amount of commissions received on the relevant transaction.
cgv.s14Text: Vary reserves the right to amend these GTC at any time. Users will be informed of any amendment by email with 30 days' prior notice. Continued use of the Platform after this period constitutes acceptance of the new GTC.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.s1Text: The Vary website is published by Vary SAS, a simplified joint-stock company with a capital of [amount] euros, registered with the Paris Trade Register under number [number]. Registered office: [address]. Publication director: [name]. Contact: contact@vary.com
mentions.s2Text: The website is hosted by Lovable Cloud (Supabase infrastructure), headquartered in the United States. Data is stored on servers located within the European Union in compliance with the GDPR.
mentions.s3Text: All elements of the Vary website (texts, images, logos, source code, database) are protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written authorization from Vary SAS.
mentions.s4Text: Vary acts as an intermediary between professional buyers and sellers. Vary cannot be held responsible for the quality, compliance, or delivery of goods sold on the platform. The escrow system aims to protect both parties.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: We collect the following data: first name, last name, email, phone, company name, SIRET number, address, type of activity, and browsing data. This data is necessary for the operation of the platform and professional account verification.
privacy.s2Text: Your data is used for: account management, transaction processing, professional identity verification, order-related communication, service improvement, and compliance with our legal obligations.
privacy.s3Text: The processing of your data is based on: contract performance (T&Cs), your consent (cookies, newsletter), our legitimate interests (security, fraud prevention), and our legal obligations (billing, taxation).
privacy.s4Text: Account data is retained for the duration of the business relationship and 3 years after the last activity. Billing data is retained for 10 years in compliance with accounting obligations. Browsing data is retained for a maximum of 13 months.
privacy.s5Text: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port, limit, and object to the processing of your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at: privacy@vary.com
privacy.s6Text: Your data may be transferred to service providers located outside the EU (hosting, payment). These transfers are governed by standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy.s7Text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encryption in transit and at rest, access control, regular security audits, and row-level security (RLS) policies in our database.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1Text: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when you visit our website. It allows us to store information related to your browsing.
cookies.s2Text: We use strictly necessary cookies (authentication, session, language preferences) and analytical cookies (audience measurement, service improvement). No advertising cookies are used on Vary.
cookies.s3Text: You can change your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings. Disabling necessary cookies may affect the operation of the site.
cookies.s4Text: Session cookies are deleted when the browser is closed. Persistent cookies (preferences, language) are retained for a maximum of 13 months in accordance with CNIL recommendations.

lotPhotos.blockedPublish: All 6 required photos must be uploaded before publishing.
lotPhotos.errorPhotoFormat: Unsupported photo format (jpg, png, webp only).

slot1.label: Pallet front view
slot1.desc: Full shot, pallet on the ground, neutral background. Shows real volume.

slot2.label: Top-down view
slot2.desc: From above, packing density and box layout visible.

slot3.label: Pallet label / delivery slip
slot3.desc: Supplier reference, weight, parcel count. B2B traceability.

slot4.label: Representative open box
slot4.desc: One open box, items loose. Average of the lot, not the best.

slot5.label: 10 items laid flat
slot5.desc: 10 random items on white/grey background. Style and color diversity visible.

slot6.label: Close-up of tags
slot6.desc: Sharp shot of tags on 3-4 items. Brand, size, MSRP if present.

slot7.label: Hero item showcase
slot7.desc: Best item of the lot, on hanger or flat. Inviting without misleading.

slot8.label: 30s video of opened pallet
slot8.desc: Quick scroll through the boxes. Formats: mp4, mov. Max 100MB.

slot9.label: Condition breakdown (table)
slot9.desc: QC document or visual sorting: new / light wear / visible defect.
